_meta.source_policy: PDF-derived learning content; story structure and characters are model_inference.

asset_policy: Generated character sheet is used as the MVP anchor portrait asset. Individual expression variants are planned, not yet separately generated.

base_team.name: Haru Mizunoe
base_team.hair_style: long loose hair with small sky-blue hair clips
base_team.signature_accessory: sky-blue pencil tucked into her notebook spiral
base_team.uniform_description: navy blazer, blue sweater vest, white shirt, modest pleated skirt, sky-blue ribbon
base_team.insecurity: afraid everyone will discover she is only keeping up by asking basic questions
base_team.speech_style: plain, direct, often starts with 'Wait, what exactly are we allowed to assume?'
base_team.reason_to_compete: to prove that asking simple questions can protect the team from repeating last year's mistake

base_team.name: Rikka Kisaragi
base_team.hair_style: high wavy ponytail with a purple scrunchie
base_team.signature_accessory: thin silver hair clip shaped like a bracket
base_team.uniform_description: navy blazer worn perfectly, violet vest and tie, lab badge holder
base_team.personality: fast, exacting, lonely when others cannot follow her jumps
base_team.insecurity: believes slowing down means losing the one thing that makes her useful
base_team.speech_style: compressed and elegant; revises herself when Haru asks for the missing step
base_team.reason_to_compete: to learn how to make brilliance usable by a team

base_team.name: Sayo Tachibana
base_team.hair_style: short bob with mint flower clip
base_team.signature_accessory: mint bookmark from last year's notebook
base_team.uniform_description: navy blazer, mint cardigan and ribbon, carefully kept skirt
base_team.insecurity: worries she passed on pressure instead of courage
base_team.speech_style: soft, image-rich, uses questions instead of orders
base_team.reason_to_compete: to turn last year's unanswered question into a gift rather than a scar
base_team.relationship_to_protagonist: senior who entrusts Haru with the unresolved question

base_team.name: Minori Kagami
base_team.hair_style: short bob with red hair clips
base_team.signature_accessory: red stopwatch used for practice rounds
base_team.uniform_description: navy blazer over a red hoodie, red ribbon, sleeves always neat
base_team.personality: harsh but not cruel, protective through standards
base_team.insecurity: terrified that being kind too early will let last year's failure repeat
base_team.speech_style: clipped, judge-like, softens only after the reasoning is solid
base_team.reason_to_compete: to make responsibility mean more than control
base_team.relationship_to_protagonist: demanding mentor who gradually recognizes Haru

rivals.name: Natsuki Shindou
rivals.visual_motif: white blazer, gold pin, ruler-straight silver hair
rivals.strength: fast symbolic manipulation and clean operator algebra
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: carries the pride of a school expected to win with flawless proofs
rivals.signature_phrase: State the space before you state the answer.

rivals.name: Mio Kurokawa
rivals.visual_motif: black cardigan, teal notebook tabs, sleepy eyes
rivals.strength: finds hidden assumptions and approximation leaks
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: wants her team's questions to be treated as contributions, not obstruction
rivals.relationship_to_protagonist_team: sharp cross-examiner who respects Haru's refusal to bluff

rivals.name: Touko Hoshimi
rivals.visual_motif: rolled sleeves, safety goggles on head, orange ribbon
rivals.strength: connects equations to apparatus, timing, loss, and readout
rivals.weakness: can distrust clean abstraction too much
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: believes every implementation claim must survive the lab bench
rivals.relationship_to_protagonist_team: friendly rival who pressures Rikka to explain physically
rivals.signature_phrase: Show me where the photon can leak.

rivals.name: Yui Amano
rivals.visual_motif: simple uniform, star hairpin, carefully mended book bag
rivals.strength: connects distant chapters and translates ideas for teammates
rivals.weakness: hesitates when the room rewards speed over synthesis
rivals.emotional_motivation_safe: wants a small school to be seen as thoughtful, not merely lucky
rivals.signature_phrase: A good answer should bring everyone with it.
